purpose: Boots Microsoft Edge WebView2 and runs the actual rendering surface. Calls CoInitializeEx (APARTMENTTHREADED), probes for the WebView2 Evergreen runtime, builds a user-data folder under %LOCALAPPDATA%\MarkdownPlusPlus\WebView2 (with %TEMP% fallback), creates the environment + controller asynchronously, sets virtual host name 'markdownplusplus.local' -> plugin assets folder and 'markdownplusplus.document' -> markdown file's directory, hooks NavigationStarting / NewWindowRequested (cancels user navigation and forwards links to LinkCallback), NavigationCompleted (sets documentLoaded_ and applies pending scroll), WebMessageReceived (parses ad-hoc JSON for previewScroll {line,ratio,force} and linkClick {href}). NavigateToString stores the pending document and either reuses the existing page via window.MarkdownPlusPlusPreview.replaceContent or does a full NavigateToString. Implements ShowPrintUi via ICoreWebView2_16 and PrintToPdf via ICoreWebView2_7, plus runtime-missing diagnostic message overlay (clickable to open the WebView2 download page).
exports: WebViewHost::ApplyPendingDocument / ApplyPendingContentUpdate / ApplyPendingScrollRatio / HandleWebMessage / UpdateDocumentHostMapping / ShowMessage (private)
calls_out_to: User32: RegisterClassExW / CreateWindowExW / DestroyWindow / MoveWindow / SetWindowTextW / InvalidateRect / SendMessageW / MessageBoxW / DefWindowProcW / DrawTextW / FillRect / GetWindowTextW / GetWindowTextLengthW / SetCursor / LoadCursorW
Gdi32: CreateSolidBrush / DeleteObject / GetStockObject / SelectObject / SetBkMode / SetTextColor
invariants: Create runs the bulk of its work inside two nested asynchronous WRL callbacks - the caller cannot assume the WebView is up immediately; use Ready() (which requires ready_ AND webView_ AND documentLoaded_) before printing/exporting.
pendingDocumentRevision_ increments on every NavigateToString; ExecuteScript completion handlers must compare against the current revision before re-navigating to avoid stomping a newer document.

Destroy must be called on the same thread that called Create (single-threaded apartment / WebView2 UI thread). It clears pending state, closes controller, releases ComPtrs, destroys the diagnostic message window, and calls CoUninitialize only if Create's CoInitializeEx returned S_OK.
Virtual host mapping for the document directory must be re-applied when documentRoot changes; UpdateDocumentHostMapping no-ops when mappedDocumentRoot_ already equals the new root.
Scroll callback signature is (sourceLine:int, ratio:double, force:bool) and is fired from the WebView UI thread.

ApplyPendingContentUpdate's ExecuteScript continuation also serves as the fallback: if window.MarkdownPlusPlusPreview.replaceContent returns false/exception (e.g. preview.js not yet loaded), it falls back to a full NavigateToString.
gotchas: JSON parsing here is hand-rolled (TryParseJson{Double,Int,String,Bool}) and is NOT a real JSON parser - it only works because preview.js emits a fixed shape with no key collisions. Do not extend without rewriting the parser.
ClampScrollRatio: the test `!(ratio >= 0.0) && !(ratio <= 1.0)` is the NaN-safe form - NaN compares false to both, so NaN clamps to 0; legitimate values get clamped via std::clamp.

Both NavigationStarting and NewWindowRequested cancel/handle navigation when it is user-initiated and route through LinkCallback only if IsRoutablePreviewNavigation() (i.e. http/https/file: that is not the local asset host). Non-routable URIs are dropped.
MessageWindowProc (the diagnostic overlay) is clickable - WM_LBUTTONUP calls ShellExecute on the WebView2 download URL. Painted dark grey background (#1E1E1E) with light text.

WebView2 runtime missing -> environment creation returns failure; ShowMessage paints the diagnostic overlay over the preview area. WebView2 version probe is best-effort and only used to compose a better error message.
